mapper.select: SELECT CUSTOMER_ID, DESIGNER_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME, PHONE, GENDER, MEMO, IS_ACTIVE, -- 활성 여부 CONSENT_YN, CONSENT_DT, CONSENT_EXPIRE_DT, LAST_VISIT_DT, REG_DT, MOD_DT FROM tb_customers WHERE DESIGNER_ID = #{designerId} AND IS_ACTIVE = 1 ORDER BY LAST_VISIT_DT DESC, REG_DT DESC

SELECT CUSTOMER_ID, DESIGNER_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME, PHONE, GENDER, MEMO, IS_ACTIVE, -- 활성 여부 CONSENT_YN, CONSENT_DT, CONSENT_EXPIRE_DT, LAST_VISIT_DT, REG_DT, MOD_DT FROM tb_customers WHERE DESIGNER_ID = #{designerId} AND IS_ACTIVE = 1 AND CUSTOMER_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY LAST_VISIT_DT DESC, REG_DT DESC

SELECT CUSTOMER_ID, DESIGNER_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME, PHONE, GENDER, MEMO, IS_ACTIVE, -- 활성 여부 CONSENT_YN, CONSENT_DT, CONSENT_EXPIRE_DT, LAST_VISIT_DT, REG_DT, MOD_DT FROM tb_customers WHERE CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerId} AND DESIGNER_ID = #{designerId} AND IS_ACTIVE = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_customers (DESIGNER_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME, PHONE, GENDER, MEMO, IS_ACTIVE, CONSENT_YN, REG_DT, MOD_DT) VALUES (#{designerId}, #{customerName}, #{phone}, #{gender}, #{memo}, 1, 0, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_customers SET GENDER = #{gender}, MOD_DT = NOW() WHERE CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerId}
UPDATE tb_customers SET CUSTOMER_NAME = #{customerName}, PHONE = #{phone}, GENDER = #{gender}, MEMO = #{memo}, MOD_DT = NOW() WHERE CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerId} AND DESIGNER_ID = #{designerId}
UPDATE tb_customers SET CONSENT_YN = 1, CONSENT_DT = #{consentDt}, CONSENT_EXPIRE_DT = #{consentExpireDt}, MOD_DT = NOW() WHERE CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerId}
UPDATE tb_customers SET IS_ACTIVE = 1, MOD_DT = NOW() WHERE CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerId}
